_comment: Cache for the code-health-auditor skill (#234). Keyed by kind:path:symbol. Seeded with the intentional allowlist so those findings are never filed; genuine dead code is discovered and filed by the skill. Resolved findings are deleted once shipped (the GitHub issue is the history), not retained here. Do not edit by hand beyond the allowlist; the skill maintains it.

unused-file:src/prompts/showLargeTransac.notes: Intentional unshipped MCP prompt scaffolding; server advertises prompts:false. Declared as an entry in knip.json.

unused-file:src/resources/accountsSummar.notes: Intentional unshipped MCP resource scaffolding; server advertises resources:false. Declared as an entry in knip.json.

unused-export:src/lib/constants.ts:DEFAU.notes: Alive via the text-parsing port_alignment guard, not a runtime import. Tagged @public in source.

doc-drift:README.md:architecture-depende.notes: README ## Architecture prose lists stale unguarded dep versions (TypeScript 5.9, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk ^1.25.2, @actual-app/api ^26.3.0) vs package.json (6.0.3 / 1.29.0 / 26.6.0). De-hardcode + guard.
